commands.review_summary:
This PR updates self-hosted vLLM/SGLang discovery, configured provider auth, implicit provider merging, provider-filtered model listing, docs, and contract tests so `provider/*` visibility can discover models from configured endpoints.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main has a high-confidence source reproduction: configure `models.providers.vllm` or `models.providers.sglang` plus `agents.defaults.models["provider/*"]`, and the shared helper returns `null` before querying the configured `/models` endpoint.
commands.review_followup: This is a valid implementation PR rather than a narrow repair job; maintainer review should choose the canonical fix among the open competing PRs and close or supersede the others after one lands.
